final:
module top_module(
  input trig,
  input clk,
  output reg out
);parameter t = 10; // duration of output pulse, in clock cycles
  
  reg [3:0] inv_counter; // 4-bit inv_counter to count t clock cycles
  
  always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (trig) begin // trigger signal is high
      inv_counter <= 0; // reset inv_counter
      out <= 1; // output pulse is high
    end else if (inv_counter < t) begin // inv_counter is less than t
      inv_counter <= inv_counter + 1; // increment inv_counter
      out <= 1; // output pulse is high
    end else begin // inv_counter is greater than or equal to t
      out <= 0; // output pulse is low
    end
  end
  
endmodule
